[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26504276/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Quantum Agency — Dubai</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Roboto+Mono:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --red:#a11517; --red-bright:#c41a1c; --black:#000; --q-black:#0d0d0d;
  --light-grey:#777; --white:#f7f7f7;
  --font-sans:'Poppins',sans-serif; --font-mono:'Roboto Mono',monospace;
}
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);font-family:var(--font-sans);overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none}

/* CURSOR */
.cursor{position:fixed;width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--red);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .2s,height .2s}
.cursor-ring{position:fixed;width:32px;height:32px;border:1px solid rgba(161,21,23,.4);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .25s,height .25s}

/* SCROLL BAR */
.scroll-line{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:var(--red);z-index:10000;width:0%}

/* NOISE */
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:8000;opacity:.35}

/* ============================  LOADER  ============================ */
#loader{position:fixed;inset:0;background:#000;z-index:9990;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;padding:60px;font-family:var(--font-mono);transition:opacity .7s,visibility .7s}
#loader.done{opacity:0;visibility:hidden}
.ll{font-size:13px;line-height:1.9;color:rgba(247,247,247,.55);opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px);transition:opacity .25s,transform .25s;white-space:nowrap}
.ll.show{opacity:1;transform:none}
.ll .p{color:var(--red)}
.ll .ok{color:#4caf50}
.ll .rdy{color:var(--red);font-weight:600}
.loader-bar-wrap{margin-top:28px;width:260px;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);overflow:hidden;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.loader-bar-wrap.show{opacity:1}
.loader-bar{height:100%;width:0%;background:var(--red)}
.loader-logo{position:absolute;bottom:48px;right:60px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .5s}
.loader-logo.show{opacity:1}
.loader-logo img{width:56px;height:56px;object-fit:contain}
.bl{display:inline-block;width:7px;height:13px;background:var(--red);margin-left:2px;vertical-align:middle;animation:bl .7s infinite}
@keyframes bl{0%,49%{opacity:1}50%,100%{opacity:0}}

/* ============================  NAV  ============================ */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;padding:22px 48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:rgba(0,0,0,.72);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;text-decoration:none}
.nav-logo img{width:30px;height:30px;object-fit:contain}
.nav-logo-text{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white)}
.nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:36px;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--light-grey);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--white)}
.nav-cta{color:var(--white)!important;border:1px solid var(--red)!important;padding:8px 20px;transition:background .2s!important}
.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--red)!important}

/* ============================  HERO  ============================ */
#hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:140px 48px 80px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 65% at 78% 50%,rgba(161,21,23,.14) 0%,transparent 70%)}
.hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.015) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.015) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:80px 80px}
.hero-eyebrow{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:32px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.hero-eyebrow::before{content:'';display:block;width:40px;height:1px;background:var(--red)}
.hero-title{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:clamp(52px,8.5vw,120px);font-weight:800;line-height:.96;letter-spacing:-.03em;max-width:860px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-title em{font-style:normal;color:var(--red)}
.hero-sub{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:13px;line-height:1.9;color:var(--light-grey);max-width:460px;margin-top:36px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;margin-top:44px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.btn-primary{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white);background:var(--red);border:none;padding:15px 36px;text-decoration:none;transition:background .2s,transform .2s;clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 10px) 0,100% 10px,100% 100%,10px 100%,0 calc(100% - 10px))}
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--red-bright);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-ghost{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);padding:15px 36px;text-decoration:none;transition:border-color .2s,color .2s}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--red);color:var(--red)}
.hero-logo-float{position:absolute;right:-3%;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:52vw;max-width:660px;opacity:.1;pointer-events:none;animation:float 9s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(-50%) rotate(-1.5deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-52%) rotate(1.5deg)}}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:56px;margin-top:72px;padding-top:36px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);position:relative;z-index:1;flex-wrap:wrap}
.stat-num{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:34px;font-weight:700;line-height:1;color:var(--white)}
.stat-num span{color:var(--red)}
.stat-label{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--light-grey);margin-top:5px}

/* ============================  MARQUEE  ============================ */
.marquee-wrap{overflow:hidden;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);padding:14px 0;background:rgba(161,21,23,.03)}
.marquee-track{display:flex;animation:marquee 22s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap}
.marquee-item{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--light-grey);padding:0 36px}
.marquee-item span{color:var(--red);margin-left:36px}
@keyframes marquee{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* ============================  SECTIONS  ============================ */
section{padding:110px 48px;position:relative}
.section-tag{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.section-tag::before{content:attr(data-num);color:rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
.section-title{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:clamp(34px,4.5vw,60px);font-weight:700;line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.02em}

/* ============================  ABOUT  ============================ */
#about{background:var(--q-black)}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center;margin-top:56px}
.about-text p{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:13px;line-height:1.9;color:var(--light-grey);margin-bottom:18px}
.about-text p strong{color:var(--white);font-weight:500}
.about-pillars{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);margin-top:36px}
.pillar{background:var(--q-black);padding:22px;transition:background .2s}
.pillar:hover{background:rgba(161,21,23,.07)}
.pillar-label{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:6px}
.pillar-text{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--white)}
.about-visual{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.about-logo-wrap{width:300px;height:300px;position:relative}
.about-logo-wrap::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-40px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(161,21,23,.25) 0%,transparent 70%);animation:pulse 4.5s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.6}50%{transform:scale(1.08);opacity:1}}
.about-logo-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;position:relative;z-index:1}

/* ============================  LOGO SLIDER  ============================ */
#clients{background:var(--black);padding:80px 0;overflow:hidden}
.clients-header{padding:0 48px 48px}
.logo-slider-wrap{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.logo-slider-wrap::before,.logo-slider-wrap::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;width:100px;z-index:2;pointer-events:none}
.logo-slider-wrap::before{left:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--black) 30%,transparent)}
.logo-slider-wrap::after{right:0;background:linear-gradient(-90deg,var(--black) 30%,transparent)}
.logo-track{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0;animation:logoScroll 45s linear infinite;width:max-content}
.logo-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused}
.logo-item{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 32px;height:70px;flex-shrink:0}
.logo-item img{height:36px;width:auto;max-width:140px;object-fit:contain;opacity:.55;filter:grayscale(100%) brightness(1.4);transition:opacity .3s,filter .3s}
.logo-item:hover img{opacity:1;filter:grayscale(0%) brightness(1)}
.logo-fallback{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--light-grey);text-transform:uppercase}
.logo-cat-divider{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 24px;flex-shrink:0;position:relative}
.logo-cat-divider::before,.logo-cat-divider::after{content:'';display:block;width:1px;height:40px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
.logo-cat-divider span{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);padding:0 14px;white-space:nowrap}
@keyframes logoScroll{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* ============================  PROBLEM  ============================ */
#problem{background:var(--black)}
.problem-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;margin-top:56px;align-items:start}
.problem-statement{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:20px;font-weight:300;line-height:1.75;color:rgba(247,247,247,.65);border-left:2px solid var(--red);padding-left:28px}
.problem-statement strong{color:var(--white);font-weight:600}
.issue-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;padding:18px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);transition:padding-left .2s}
.issue-item:hover{padding-left:8px}
.issue-num{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--red);min-width:26px}
.issue-text{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--light-grey)}

/* ============================  APPROACH  ============================ */
#approach{background:var(--q-black)}
.approach-stages{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);margin-top:56px}
.stage{background:var(--q-black);padding:44px 32px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background .3s}
.stage:hover{background:rgba(161,21,23,.06)}
.stage::before{content:attr(data-stage);position:absolute;top:-8px;right:16px;font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:90px;font-weight:900;color:rgba(255,255,255,.025);line-height:1;pointer-events:none}
.stage-num{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:18px;text-transform:uppercase}
.stage-title{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:26px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(--white)}
.stage-desc{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;line-height:1.85;color:var(--light-grey)}
.approach-note{margin-top:40px;padding:32px;border:1px solid rgba(161,21,23,.25);background:rgba(161,21,23,.03);font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(247,247,247,.5);max-width:680px}
.approach-note strong{color:var(--white)}

/* ============================  SERVICES  ============================ */
#services{background:var(--black)}
.services-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);margin-top:56px}
.service-card{background:var(--black);padding:36px 28px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background .3s}
.service-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:0;height:2px;background:var(--red);transition:width .4s ease}
.service-card:hover{background:rgba(161,21,23,.04)}
.service-card:hover::after{width:100%}
.service-icon{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--red);letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:18px}
.service-name{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:10px}
.service-desc{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;line-height:1.85;color:var(--light-grey)}

/* ============================  WORK  ============================ */
#work{background:var(--q-black)}
.work-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);margin-top:56px}
.work-card{background:var(--q-black);position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer}
.work-card:hover .work-img{transform:scale(1.04)}
.work-card:hover .work-overlay{opacity:1}
.work-img-wrap{height:260px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;background:#111}
.work-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .5s ease;display:block}
.work-bg-card{background-size:cover;background-position:center;background-repeat:no-repeat}
.work-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(161,21,23,.72);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.work-overlay span{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white)}
.work-info{padding:28px}
.work-tag{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:8px}
.work-client{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:6px}
.work-desc{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--light-grey);margin-bottom:14px}
.work-result{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:rgba(247,247,247,.35)}
.work-result strong{color:var(--red)}
.work-list{margin-top:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.work-list-item{background:var(--q-black);display:grid;grid-template-columns:70px 1fr 1fr auto;gap:32px;align-items:center;padding:22px 28px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);transition:background .2s,padding-left .25s}
.work-list-item:hover{background:rgba(161,21,23,.04);padding-left:36px}
.wl-num{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--red)}
.wl-client{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:17px;font-weight:600;color:var(--white)}
.wl-type{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--light-grey)}
.wl-result{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--red);text-align:right;white-space:nowrap}

/* Dubai Games / Daman text overlay cards */
.work-text-overlay{position:relative;height:260px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;padding:28px;background-size:cover;background-position:center}
.work-text-overlay::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,.88) 50%,rgba(0,0,0,.3))}
.work-text-overlay-content{position:relative;z-index:1}
.work-text-overlay .work-tag{margin-bottom:6px}
.work-text-overlay .work-client{font-size:24px}

/* ============================  IMPACT  ============================ */
#impact{background:var(--black)}
.impact-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:end;margin-bottom:64px}
.impact-intro{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:13px;line-height:1.9;color:var(--light-grey);margin-top:22px}
.impact-metrics{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.metric{background:var(--black);padding:36px 28px;transition:background .2s}
.metric:hover{background:rgba(161,21,23,.05)}
.metric-value{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:44px;font-weight:800;line-height:1;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:6px}
.metric-value span{color:var(--red)}
.metric-label{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--light-grey)}
.kpi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.kpi{background:var(--black);padding:26px 18px;text-align:center}
.kpi-sym{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:18px;color:var(--red);display:block;margin-bottom:10px}
.kpi-text{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--light-grey);line-height:1.6}

/* ============================  ENGAGEMENT  ============================ */
#engagement{background:var(--q-black)}
.eng-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);margin-top:56px}
.eng-card{background:var(--q-black);padding:44px 36px}
.eng-type{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:14px}
.eng-title{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:18px}
.eng-body{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;line-height:1.9;color:var(--light-grey);margin-bottom:24px}
.eng-list{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px}
.eng-list li{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--light-grey);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px}
.eng-list li::before{content:'—';color:var(--red);flex-shrink:0}

/* ============================  TEAM  ============================ */
#team{background:var(--black)}
.team-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);margin-top:56px}
.team-card{background:var(--black);padding:44px 36px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background .3s}
.team-card:hover{background:rgba(161,21,23,.04)}
.team-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--red);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .4s ease}
.team-card:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.team-role{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:6px}
.team-name{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:28px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:4px}
.team-handle{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--light-grey);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:22px}
.team-bio{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;line-height:1.9;color:var(--light-grey)}

/* ============================  WHY  ============================ */
#why{background:var(--q-black);text-align:center}
.why-content{max-width:780px;margin:56px auto 0}
.why-statement{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:clamp(22px,3vw,36px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.65;color:rgba(247,247,247,.65);margin-bottom:56px}
.why-statement strong{color:var(--white);font-weight:700}
.why-statement em{font-style:normal;color:var(--red)}
.why-pillars{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.why-pill{background:var(--q-black);padding:30px 20px;transition:background .2s}
.why-pill:hover{background:rgba(161,21,23,.07)}
.why-pill-sym{font-size:20px;color:var(--red);display:block;margin-bottom:10px}
.why-pill-text{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--white)}

/* ============================  CONTACT  ============================ */
#contact{background:var(--black);min-height:65vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;text-align:center}
#contact::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 80% at 50% 100%,rgba(161,21,23,.12) 0%,transparent 70%)}
.contact-inner{position:relative;z-index:1}
.contact-title{font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:clamp(44px,7.5vw,100px);font-weight:800;line-height:1;letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:36px}
.contact-title em{font-style:normal;color:var(--red)}
.contact-sub{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:13px;color:var(--light-grey);margin-bottom:44px;line-height:1.8}
.contact-email{display:inline-block;font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:clamp(16px,2.2vw,26px);font-weight:300;color:var(--white);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);padding-bottom:4px;transition:color .2s,border-color .2s;letter-spacing:.04em}
.contact-email:hover{color:var(--red);border-color:var(--red)}

/* ============================  FOOTER  ============================ */
footer{padding:36px 48px;background:var(--q-black);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.footer-l,.footer-r{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--light-grey);letter-spacing:.08em}

/* ============================  REVEAL  ============================ */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);transition:opacity .65s ease,transform .65s ease}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:none}

/* ============================  MOBILE  ============================ */
@media(max-width:900px){
  nav{padding:18px 20px} .nav-links{display:none}
  section{padding:72px 20px} #hero{padding:110px 20px 56px}
  .hero-logo-float{display:none}
  .about-grid,.problem-layout,.impact-layout,.team-grid,.eng-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:36px}
  .approach-stages,.services-grid,.work-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .kpi-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .why-pillars{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .work-list-item{grid-template-columns:40px 1fr} .wl-type,.wl-result{display:none}
  footer{flex-direction:column;gap:10px;text-align:center}
  .impact-metrics{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  #clients{padding:60px 0}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="scroll-line" id="scrollLine"></div>
<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursorRing"></div>

<!-- LOADER -->
<div id="loader">
  <div id="loaderLines"></div>
  <div class="loader-bar-wrap" id="loaderBarWrap"><div class="loader-bar" id="loaderBar"></div></div>
  <div class="loader-logo" id="loaderLogo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Quantum Agency"></div>
</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Q">
    <span class="nav-logo-text">Quantum Agency</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#work">Work</a></li>
    <li><a href="#team">Team</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Get in Touch</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <img class="hero-logo-float" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  <div class="hero-eyebrow">Dubai · 2026</div>
  <h1 class="hero-title reveal">The<br><em>Mechanics</em><br>Behind<br>Your Brand.</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub reveal">Dubai-based integrated content and production agency. Specializing in fintech, web3, automotive, and virtual assets. We diagnose, structure, and execute communication systems built for measurable return.</p>
  <div class="hero-actions reveal">
    <a href="#work" class="btn-primary">View Our Work</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="btn-ghost">Start a Project</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stats reveal">
    <div><div class="stat-num">20<span>+</span></div><div class="stat-label">Years Regional Experience</div></div>
    <div><div class="stat-num">55<span>M+</span></div><div class="stat-label">Platform Users Reached</div></div>
    <div><div class="stat-num">6<span>M+</span></div><div class="stat-label">Social Reach (Single Campaign)</div></div>
    <div><div class="stat-num">$300<span>K+</span></div><div class="stat-label">Revenue Generated in 5 Weeks</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MARQUEE -->
<div class="marquee-wrap">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <div class="marquee-item">Fintech<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Web3<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">Virtual Assets<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Automotive<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">iGaming<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Esports<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">Real Estate<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Crypto<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">Banking<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Dubai<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">MENA<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">Fintech<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Web3<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">Virtual Assets<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Automotive<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">iGaming<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Esports<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">Real Estate<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Crypto<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">Banking<span>·</span></div><div class="marquee-item">Dubai<span>·</span></div>
    <div class="marquee-item">MENA<span>·</span></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="section-tag" data-num="01">About</div>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">We Are <span style="color:var(--red)">Quantum.</span></h2>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-text reveal">
      <p>Dubai-based strategic content and production agency, specializing in fintech, web3, automotive, and virtual assets.</p>
      <p>We operate as <strong>the mechanics behind your visual and communication systems.</strong> Diagnosing, structuring, and executing content strategies that translate your ideas into clear and impactful narratives.</p>
      <p>Our team combines experience in marketing, production, and strategic communication to support organizations that operate in environments where precision, credibility, and clarity are essential. We analyze, strategize, and engineer communication systems designed to perform.</p>
      <div class="about-pillars">
        <div class="pillar"><div class="pillar-label">We are</div><div class="pillar-text">Strategic</div></div>
        <div class="pillar"><div class="pillar-label">We are</div><div class="pillar-text">Functional</div></div>
        <div class="pillar"><div class="pillar-label">We are</div><div class="pillar-text">ROI-Focused</div></div>
        <div class="pillar"><div class="pillar-label">We are</div><div class="pillar-text">Minimal</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-visual reveal">
      <div class="about-logo-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Quantum Logo"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CLIENT LOGO SLIDER -->
<section id="clients" style="padding:80px 0;">
  <div class="clients-header reveal">
    <div class="section-tag" data-num="02">Clients</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Trusted By <span style="color:var(--red)">Industry Leaders.</span></h2>
  </div>
  <div class="logo-slider-wrap">
    <div class="logo-track">
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>Automotive</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mercedes-Benz" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Volvo" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Alfa Romeo" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Suzuki" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>Banking & Finance</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Deem" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Daman Investments" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Daman Securities" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>Virtual Assets</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Daman Virtual" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Binance" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bybit" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Gate.io" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dubai Blockchain Center" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>iGaming</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Emirates Draw" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>Real Estate</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dubai Properties" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="JBR" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="City Walk" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>Automotive</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mercedes-Benz" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Volvo" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Alfa Romeo" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Suzuki" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>Banking & Finance</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Deem" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Daman Investments" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Daman Securities" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>Virtual Assets</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Daman Virtual" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Binance" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bybit" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Gate.io" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dubai Blockchain Center" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>iGaming</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Emirates Draw" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-cat-divider"><span>Real Estate</span></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dubai Properties" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="JBR" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="logo-item"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="City Walk" loading="lazy"></div>
</div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROBLEM -->
<section id="problem">
  <div class="section-tag" data-num="03">The Problem</div>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">The Gap Between<br>Capability and <span style="color:var(--red)">Clarity.</span></h2>
  <div class="problem-layout">
    <div class="problem-statement reveal">
      Organizations in complex industries often face the same challenge. Their products and services are powerful — but <strong>difficult to communicate.</strong><br><br>
      The result: a gap between what a company does and how clearly the market understands it. Lost attention, missed opportunities, reduced trust.
    </div>
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="issue-item"><span class="issue-num">01</span><span class="issue-text">Complex technical language</span></div>
      <div class="issue-item"><span class="issue-num">02</span><span class="issue-text">Overly dense messaging</span></div>
      <div class="issue-item"><span class="issue-num">03</span><span class="issue-text">Weak social media positioning</span></div>
      <div class="issue-item"><span class="issue-num">04</span><span class="issue-text">Underutilized storytelling opportunities</span></div>
      <div class="issue-item"><span class="issue-num">05</span><span class="issue-text">Low engagement despite strong offerings</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- APPROACH -->
<section id="approach">
  <div class="section-tag" data-num="04">Our Approach</div>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Quantum Mechanics.<br><span style="color:var(--red)">Applied to Communication.</span></h2>
  <div class="approach-stages">
    <div class="stage reveal" data-stage="1">
      <div class="stage-num">Stage 01 / Analysis</div>
      <div class="stage-title">Diagnose</div>
      <div class="stage-desc">We diagnose the communication environment, audience expectations, business needs, and positioning gaps.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stage reveal" data-stage="2">
      <div class="stage-num">Stage 02 / Strategy</div>
      <div class="stage-title">Structure</div>
      <div class="stage-desc">We structure a clear narrative framework designed to translate complex information into accessible and engaging multimedia formats.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stage reveal" data-stage="3">
      <div class="stage-num">Stage 03 / Execution</div>
      <div class="stage-title">Execute</div>
      <div class="stage-desc">We produce and manage content systems designed to perform across platforms while maintaining brand credibility.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="approach-note reveal">
    Our role is to function as <strong>the mechanics behind the machine</strong>, ensuring your marketing engine runs smoothly, efficiently, and strategically.
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="section-tag" data-num="05">Services</div>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">What We <span style="color:var(--red)">Build.</span></h2>
  <div class="services-grid">
    <div class="service-card reveal"><div class="service-icon">01</div><div class="service-name">Social Media Management</div><div class="service-desc">End-to-end strategy, content creation, scheduling, and performance optimization across all relevant platforms.</div></div>
    <div class="service-card reveal"><div class="service-icon">02</div><div class="service-name">Content Production</div><div class="service-desc">High-volume video, photo, and written content production built for performance and scalability.</div></div>
    <div class="service-card reveal"><div class="service-icon">03</div><div class="service-name">Branding</div><div class="service-desc">Identity systems, brand guidelines, visual language, and communication architecture built for credibility and recognition.</div></div>
    <div class="service-card reveal"><div class="service-icon">04</div><div class="service-name">Strategy and Consulting</div><div class="service-desc">Communication strategy, positioning frameworks, audience persona development, and go-to-market planning.</div></div>
    <div class="service-card reveal"><div class="service-icon">05</div><div class="service-name">Documentary Production</div><div class="service-desc">Long-form cinematic storytelling that builds authority and positions your brand as a definitive voice in your industry.</div></div>
    <div class="service-card reveal"><div class="service-icon">06</div><div class="service-name">Podcasting Services</div><div class="service-desc">Full end-to-end podcast production — concept, scripting, recording, post-production, and multi-platform distribution.</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WORK -->
<section id="work">
  <div class="section-tag" data-num="06">Case Studies</div>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Proven <span style="color:var(--red)">Results.</span></h2>
  <div class="work-grid">

    <!-- Mercedes -->
    <div class="work-card reveal">
      <div class="work-img-wrap">
        <img class="work-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mercedes-Benz">
        <div class="work-overlay"><span>Automotive</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="work-info">
        <div class="work-tag">Automotive · Commercial Production · Photography</div>
        <div class="work-client">Mercedes-Benz</div>
        <div class="work-desc">Two commercials for the GLE SUV and GLE Coupe. Cinematic storytelling blended with dynamic product shots, urban and desert backdrops, in a modular edit style for both short and long-form assets.</div>
        <div class="work-result">Q4 hero assets for the GCC luxury market</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Esports -->
    <div class="work-card reveal">
      <div class="work-img-wrap">
        <img class="work-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Compass Esports">
        <div class="work-overlay"><span>Esports</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="work-info">
        <div class="work-tag">Esports · Live Broadcast · Documentary</div>
        <div class="work-client">Compass 2024</div>
        <div class="work-desc">Produced and broadcast Compass 2024 with live Arabic coverage and a behind-the-scenes documentary. Full multi-camera live setup via OBS/Livepeer with on-ground interviews and event footage.</div>
        <div class="work-result">Arabic esports coverage at international standard</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Dubai Games — red grid bg with text overlay -->
    <div class="work-card reveal">
      <div class="work-text-overlay" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')">
        <div class="work-overlay" style="opacity:0" onmouseenter="this.style.opacity=1" onmouseleave="this.style.opacity=0"><span>Sports</span></div>
        <div class="work-text-overlay-content">
          <div class="work-tag">Sports · Livestream · Social Media · Podcast</div>
          <div class="work-client" style="font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white)">Dubai Games</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="work-info">
        <div class="work-desc">Covered the Dubai Games across three days in Arabic and English on myco.io. Documented athlete journeys through interviews and behind-the-scenes content. Partnered with Dubai TV for VIP coverage.</div>
        <div class="work-result"><strong>7.5M+</strong> views · <strong>1.4M</strong> users · 20 social posts</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Daman Virtual — red grid bg -->
    <div class="work-card reveal">
      <div class="work-text-overlay" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');filter:hue-rotate(0deg)">
        <div class="work-overlay" style="opacity:0" onmouseenter="this.style.opacity=1" onmouseleave="this.style.opacity=0"><span>Virtual Assets</span></div>
        <div class="work-text-overlay-content">
          <div class="work-tag">Virtual Assets · Branding · Pre-launch Strategy</div>
          <div class="work-client" style="font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white)">Daman Virtual</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="work-info">
        <div class="work-desc">Pre-launch brand strategy for a pioneering virtual assets company. Branding workshops, complete corporate identity, "The Next" podcast, newsletters, and a multi-channel social media strategy.</div>
        <div class="work-result">Brand and content guidelines established ahead of launch</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FUMO -->
    <div class="work-card reveal">
      <div class="work-img-wrap">
        <img class="work-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="FUMO Podcast">
        <div class="work-overlay"><span>Fintech</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="work-info">
        <div class="work-tag">Fintech · Podcast · Social Media</div>
        <div class="work-client">FUMO Podcast</div>
        <div class="work-desc">Full end-to-end podcast production — studio setup, scripting guidance, episodic video capture, post-production, and distribution across myco.io and social channels.</div>
        <div class="work-result">Thought-leadership platform for finance, business, and innovation</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Encrypted -->
    <div class="work-card reveal">
      <div class="work-img-wrap">
        <img class="work-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Encrypted Podcast">
        <div class="work-overlay"><span>Web3</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="work-info">
        <div class="work-tag">Web3 · Podcast · Branding</div>
        <div class="work-client">Encrypted Podcast</div>
        <div class="work-desc">Episodic content production with industry leaders for the crypto and fintech space. Strategic distribution via myco.io positioning Encrypted as the leading regional crypto podcast.</div>
        <div class="work-result">Leading regional Web3 podcast</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Text list for remaining -->
  <div class="work-list">
    <div class="work-list-item reveal">
      <span class="wl-num">07</span><span class="wl-client">Binance</span>
      <span class="wl-type">Crypto · Event Coverage · Content Strategy</span>
      <span class="wl-result">3M+ views · 12+ video assets</span>
    </div>
    <div class="work-list-item reveal">
      <span class="wl-num">08</span><span class="wl-client">Emirates Draw</span>
      <span class="wl-type">iGaming · Performance Marketing · Campaign KV</span>
      <span class="wl-result">$300K+ in 5 weeks · 6M+ users</span>
    </div>
    <div class="work-list-item reveal">
      <span class="wl-num">09</span><span class="wl-client">Residual</span>
      <span class="wl-type">Real Estate · Podcast · Video Strategy</span>
      <span class="wl-result">30K+ engagements/month</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- IMPACT -->
<section id="impact">
  <div class="section-tag" data-num="07">ROI &amp; Impact</div>
  <div class="impact-layout">
    <div>
      <h2 class="section-title reveal">Measurable <span style="color:var(--red)">Performance.</span></h2>
      <p class="impact-intro reveal">Our objective is measurable performance. By structuring communication as a strategic system, organizations move from sporadic content creation to continuous narrative control.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="impact-metrics reveal">
      <div class="metric"><div class="metric-value">6<span>M+</span></div><div class="metric-label">Users Reached</div></div>
      <div class="metric"><div class="metric-value">$300<span>K</span></div><div class="metric-label">Revenue in 5 Weeks</div></div>
      <div class="metric"><div class="metric-value">7.5<span>M</span></div><div class="metric-label">Event Views</div></div>
      <div class="metric"><div class="metric-value">30<span>K+</span></div><div class="metric-label">Monthly Engagements</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-grid reveal">
    <div class="kpi"><span class="kpi-sym">↑</span><div class="kpi-text">Audience Engagement Growth</div></div>
    <div class="kpi"><span class="kpi-sym">◎</span><div class="kpi-text">Clearer Brand Recognition</div></div>
    <div class="kpi"><span class="kpi-sym">≡</span><div class="kpi-text">Communication Consistency</div></div>
    <div class="kpi"><span class="kpi-sym">⊕</span><div class="kpi-text">Social Media Visibility</div></div>
    <div class="kpi"><span class="kpi-sym">◈</span><div class="kpi-text">Investor &amp; Stakeholder Communication</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ENGAGEMENT -->
<section id="engagement">
  <div class="section-tag" data-num="08">How We Operate</div>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Engagement <span style="color:var(--red)">Model.</span></h2>
  <div class="eng-grid">
    <div class="eng-card reveal">
      <div class="eng-type">Primary</div>
      <div class="eng-title">Retainer Partnership</div>
      <p class="eng-body">Quantum Agency primarily operates through retainer partnerships. This structure allows us to act as a continuous strategic partner rather than a one-off vendor.</p>
      <ul class="eng-list">
        <li>Monthly video production</li>
        <li>Content strategy and planning</li>
        <li>Ongoing social media support</li>
        <li>Campaign-based production</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="eng-card reveal">
      <div class="eng-type">Secondary</div>
      <div class="eng-title">Project-Based</div>
      <p class="eng-body">Project-based collaborations are available for specific campaigns or initiatives with defined deliverables and timelines.</p>
      <ul class="eng-list">
        <li>Campaign key visual creation</li>
        <li>Launch content packages</li>
        <li>Event coverage and production</li>
        <li>Brand identity projects</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TEAM -->
<section id="team">
  <div class="section-tag" data-num="09">Team</div>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Meet The <span style="color:var(--red)">Mechanics.</span></h2>
  <div class="team-grid">
    <div class="team-card reveal">
      <div class="team-role">Founder · Chief Marketing Officer</div>
      <div class="team-name">Tariq Jaser</div>
      <div class="team-handle">The Strategist</div>
      <p class="team-bio">Results-driven CMO and commercial leader with 15+ years of experience scaling platforms and driving revenue across MENA, Europe, and Asia. As CMO of Myco, grew the platform to 55M+ users and built $20M+ in advertising and partnership revenue.<br><br>Delivered measurable results for Dubai Holding, Gargash Group, Jumeirah Group, Hitachi, and BIC, combining performance marketing, partnerships, and monetization strategies. Through Quantum Agency, the focus is on driving real business growth and revenue.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="team-card reveal">
      <div class="team-role">Executive Producer · Operations Lead</div>
      <div class="team-name">Ghassan AlKhabaz</div>
      <div class="team-handle">The Producer</div>
      <p class="team-bio">Executive Producer and operations lead with 6+ years of experience managing multi-market content production across 5+ industries. Leads content marketing operations end-to-end, structuring workflows, managing teams, and delivering high-volume content across live productions, branded campaigns, and long-form formats including podcasts and documentaries.<br><br>At Quantum Agency, the focus is on building scalable production systems that drive efficiency, consistency, and measurable impact.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHY -->
<section id="why">
  <div class="section-tag" data-num="10" style="justify-content:center">Why Quantum</div>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal" style="text-align:center">Communication<br>as a <span style="color:var(--red)">Mission.</span></h2>
  <div class="why-content">
    <p class="why-statement reveal">Quantum Agency exists for organizations operating in <strong>high-complexity environments.</strong> Communication is approached as <em>a mission</em>, not simply a service.</p>
    <div class="why-pillars reveal">
      <div class="why-pill"><span class="why-pill-sym">◎</span><div class="why-pill-text">Strategic Thinking</div></div>
      <div class="why-pill"><span class="why-pill-sym">⬡</span><div class="why-pill-text">Production Expertise</div></div>
      <div class="why-pill"><span class="why-pill-sym">◈</span><div class="why-pill-text">Industry Understanding</div></div>
      <div class="why-pill"><span class="why-pill-sym">↗</span><div class="why-pill-text">Operational Storytelling</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="contact-inner">
    <div class="section-tag" data-num="11" style="justify-content:center">Contact</div>
    <h2 class="contact-title reveal">Let's Build<br>Something <em>Real.</em></h2>
    <p class="contact-sub reveal">Dubai, UAE · Available globally<br>Strategy · Production · Content</p>
    <a href="mailto:info@quantumagency.me" class="contact-email reveal">info@quantumagency.me</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-l">© 2026 Quantum L.L.C — Dubai, UAE</div>
  <div class="footer-r">quantumagency.me</div>
</footer>

<script>
// CURSOR
const cursor=document.getElementById('cursor'),ring=document.getElementById('cursorRing');
let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY;cursor.style.left=mx+'px';cursor.style.top=my+'px';});
(function a(){rx+=(mx-rx)*.1;ry+=(my-ry)*.1;ring.style.left=rx+'px';ring.style.top=ry+'px';requestAnimationFrame(a)})();
document.querySelectorAll('a,button').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{cursor.style.width='18px';cursor.style.height='18px';ring.style.width='50px';ring.style.height='50px'});
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{cursor.style.width='8px';cursor.style.height='8px';ring.style.width='32px';ring.style.height='32px'});
});

// SCROLL PROGRESS
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{document.getElementById('scrollLine').style.width=(window.scrollY/(document.body.scrollHeight-window.innerHeight)*100)+'%'});

// REVEAL
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(e=>e.forEach(en=>{if(en.isIntersecting){en.target.classList.add('visible');obs.unobserve(en.target)}}),{threshold:.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
document.querySelectorAll('.services-grid,.approach-stages,.work-grid,.why-pillars,.kpi-grid').forEach(g=>{
  g.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach((el,i)=>el.style.transitionDelay=(i*70)+'ms');
});

// TERMINAL LOADER
const lines=[
  {t:'Initializing Quantum Agency...', d:0},
  {t:'<span class="p">$</span> Loading brand system',d:280},
  {t:'<span class="ok">[OK]</span> Color palette — #a11517 / #000000 / #f7f7f7',d:560},
  {t:'<span class="ok">[OK]</span> Typography — Poppins · Roboto Mono',d:820},
  {t:'<span class="p">$</span> Connecting to Dubai, UAE',d:1080},
  {t:'<span class="ok">[OK]</span> Region: MENA · Entity: Quantum L.L.C',d:1340},
  {t:'<span class="p">$</span> Loading case studies...',d:1600},
  {t:'<span class="ok">[OK]</span> 9 case studies across 6 industries',d:1860},
  {t:'<span class="p">$</span> Mounting communication systems',d:2120},
  {t:'<span class="ok">[OK]</span> Fintech · Web3 · Automotive · Virtual Assets',d:2380},
  {t:'<span class="rdy">[READY]</span> QUANTUM AGENCY // 2026 <span class="bl"></span>',d:2640},
];
const cont=document.getElementById('loaderLines'),barW=document.getElementById('loaderBarWrap'),bar=document.getElementById('loaderBar'),logo=document.getElementById('loaderLogo');
lines.forEach((l,i)=>{
  setTimeout(()=>{
    const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='ll';d.innerHTML=l.t;cont.appendChild(d);
    requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>d.classList.add('show')));
    if(i===1)barW.classList.add('show');
    bar.style.transition=`width ${3000/lines.length}ms linear`;
    bar.style.width=((i+1)/lines.length*100)+'%';
  },l.d);
});
setTimeout(()=>logo.classList.add('show'),2400);
setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById('loader').classList.add('done');document.body.style.overflow='auto';},3500);
document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
</script>
</body>
</html>
